description: Cross-set Alola Grass evolution-line mirror — Bounsweet (Stage 1) → Steenee (Stage 2). Same species-lineage at adjacent evolution stages, designer-coordinated continuity via shared visual register (pink-and-green fruit-creature) and Pokedex lineage. The line's Stage 3 (Tsareena) is Trial Captain Mallow's signature Pokemon, which surfaces a future chain candidate when an Alola-region Tsareena card enters corpus.
other_candidates_considered: Future chain target: when a Tsareena card enters corpus, this 2-node mirror can extend to a 3-node chain (Bounsweet -> Steenee -> Tsareena) AND connect to alola-trial-captains Mallow's signature-Pokemon anchor.
